@dev Set or update the project estimate.
      Should ideally be set before any allocations.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) pure returns (struct GovFundAllocation.FundRecord memory[] memory)

documentation.text: @dev Get full history of all allocations for a project.
@dev Get project summary — estimate, total allocated, and remaining budget.

allocateFund(string,string,string,uint25.details: Record a new fund allocation for a government project.

params._fundAllocated: Amount being allocated in this transaction (in smallest unit)
params._projectId: Short unique ID for the project  (e.g. "PROJ-2024-001")

getProjectHistory(string).details: Get full history of all allocations for a project.

getProjectRecordIds(string).details: Get all record IDs for a project.

getProjectSummary(string).details: Get project summary — estimate, total allocated, and remaining budget.

getRecord(uint256).details: Get a single fund record by its ID.

setProjectEstimate(string,uint256).details: Set or update the project estimate.      Should ideally be set before any allocations.

verifyProjectIntegrity(string).details: Verify integrity — returns true if a record's stored total matches      the sum of all individual allocations for that project up to that record.      Useful to prove data hasn't been tampered.
